annotation_policy: See attachment_gold_annotation_spec.md for full rules. Singular form, lowercase, merged synonyms, no enumeration context.

gold_attachments.label: Arcline Logic-579 LR
gold_attachments.rationale: Named BMS equipment — top-level asset

gold_attachments.label: BMS enclosure
gold_attachments.rationale: Structural battery management system enclosure — housing

gold_attachments.label: BMS lid
gold_attachments.rationale: Cover of the BMS enclosure — housing/cover (Housing > Component)

gold_attachments.label: seal
gold_attachments.rationale: Enclosure sealing element (gasket merged as exact synonym) — seal (Seal > Component)

gold_attachments.label: lid flange
gold_attachments.rationale: Flange on the BMS lid providing sealing surface (flange merged) — component

gold_attachments.label: connector pass-through
gold_attachments.rationale: Pass-through opening for connector wiring — connector feature (Connector > Component)

gold_attachments.label: pass-through defect
gold_attachments.rationale: Defect at a pass-through location — fault

gold_attachments.label: leak path
gold_attachments.rationale: Pathway along which leakage occurs (water path and moisture path merged) — fault

gold_attachments.label: moisture complaint
gold_attachments.rationale: Reported moisture observation triggering service — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: leak history
gold_attachments.rationale: Recorded history of prior leaks — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: water tracks
gold_attachments.rationale: Visible traces of water on the enclosure — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: pass-through leak
gold_attachments.rationale: Leak occurring at a pass-through location — fault

gold_attachments.label: flange seep
gold_attachments.rationale: Seepage observed at the flange — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: controller
gold_attachments.rationale: BMS controller electronics — controller

gold_attachments.label: joint
gold_attachments.rationale: Seal joint where gasket ends meet — component

gold_attachments.label: flattened section
gold_attachments.rationale: Section of seal with compression loss — fault

gold_attachments.label: adhesive residue
gold_attachments.rationale: Leftover adhesive from previous seal installation — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: corner
gold_attachments.rationale: Corner of the enclosure groove or flange — component

gold_attachments.label: pinched gasket
gold_attachments.rationale: Gasket damaged by pinching at a corner — fault

gold_attachments.label: bolt-boss transition
gold_attachments.rationale: Transition area where seal groove passes a bolt boss — component

gold_attachments.label: connector pass-through corner
gold_attachments.rationale: Corner of a connector pass-through opening — connector feature (Connector > Component)

gold_attachments.label: seal groove
gold_attachments.rationale: Groove channel where the seal sits — seal interface (Seal > Component)

gold_attachments.label: scratch
gold_attachments.rationale: Surface scratch on the sealing surface — fault

gold_attachments.label: flange distortion
gold_attachments.rationale: Deformation of the flange surface — fault

gold_attachments.label: trapped dirt
gold_attachments.rationale: Dirt trapped in the groove or flange — fault (contamination)

gold_attachments.label: seal scrap
gold_attachments.rationale: Leftover material from the previous seal — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: burr
gold_attachments.rationale: Raised edge or rough spot on sealing surface — fault (raised burr merged)

gold_attachments.label: flatness
gold_attachments.rationale: Surface flatness of the lid/flange confirmed during dry-fit — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: dowel alignment
gold_attachments.rationale: Alignment of dowel pins during lid fitting — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: flange contact
gold_attachments.rationale: Contact between flange mating surfaces confirmed — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: sealing surface
gold_attachments.rationale: Surface providing the seal mating interface — seal interface (Seal > Component)

gold_attachments.label: rolled flange
gold_attachments.rationale: Flange with edge rolled over — fault

gold_attachments.label: pass-through transition
gold_attachments.rationale: Transition area at a pass-through opening — connector feature (Connector > Component)

gold_attachments.label: compression
gold_attachments.rationale: Seal compression condition around the groove — state

gold_attachments.label: seal height
gold_attachments.rationale: Height of the seal in the groove — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: connector opening
gold_attachments.rationale: Opening in the enclosure for connector pass-through — connector feature (Connector > Component)

gold_attachments.label: dowel
gold_attachments.rationale: Alignment dowel pin on the enclosure — component

gold_attachments.label: dowel point
gold_attachments.rationale: Location points where dowel pins seat — component

gold_attachments.label: high spot
gold_attachments.rationale: Raised area causing uneven seal compression — fault

gold_attachments.label: boss
gold_attachments.rationale: Raised boss feature on the enclosure — component

gold_attachments.label: fastener
gold_attachments.rationale: Bolts securing the BMS lid — fastener (Fastener > Component)

gold_attachments.label: seal-compression line
gold_attachments.rationale: Visible line indicating seal compression during tightening — observable signal

gold_attachments.label: lid-to-base gap
gold_attachments.rationale: Gap between lid and base during tightening — measurable signal

gold_attachments.label: uniform compression
gold_attachments.rationale: Even compression of seal confirmed around the full perimeter — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: enclosure boundary
gold_attachments.rationale: Outer boundary of the enclosure where leak testing is performed — housing

gold_attachments.label: dry enclosure path
gold_attachments.rationale: Path on enclosure confirmed dry after leak testing — concluded acceptance state

gold_attachments.label: flange condition
gold_attachments.rationale: Condition of the flange to be documented — inspection signal

gold_attachments.label: corner transition
gold_attachments.rationale: Transition area at enclosure corners where compression varies — component

gold_attachments.label: leak zone
gold_attachments.rationale: Zone on the enclosure where leakage was previously identified — fault location
